postReview.title: France 1-3 Italy: Azzurri launch stunning fightback after 12-second setback
postReview.description: Italy made an impressive start to their Nations League campaign on Friday, fighting back from an early setback to beat France 3-1 in Paris.

preReview.title: Deschamps bemused by 'embarrassing' Rabiot transfer situation
preReview.description: France face Italy in the first match of their Nations League campaign on Friday, but Adrien Rabiot will not be involved for Les Bleus.
